test_cases.title: Python code block has syntax highlighting
test_cases.description: A fenced code block with ```python renders with Shiki syntax highlighting for keywords, strings, comments, and functions
steps: Send AI message containing a Python code block
Verify keywords (def, if, return) are colored

test_cases.title: Unknown language code block renders as plain text
test_cases.description: A fenced code block with an unrecognized language tag renders without syntax highlighting errors
steps: Send AI message with ```unknown_lang code block

test_cases.title: Code block displays language label
test_cases.description: The language name appears in the code block header
steps: Send AI message with ```typescript code block
Verify 'typescript' label is visible in the header

test_cases.title: Copy button copies code content
test_cases.description: Clicking the copy button puts the code content into clipboard
steps: Send AI message with a code block
Verify pasted content matches the code block content

test_cases.title: Line numbers are displayed and non-selectable
test_cases.description: Code blocks show line numbers on the left, and they cannot be selected
steps: Send AI message with a multi-line code block
Verify they are not selectable (user-select: none)

test_cases.title: Filename tag displayed from fence info
test_cases.description: ```python:main.py shows 'main.py' in the code block header

test_cases.title: Long code block (>20 lines) collapses by default
test_cases.description: Code blocks with more than 20 lines show only first 10 lines with expand button
steps: Send AI message with a 30-line code block

test_cases.title: Headings h1-h4 have distinct sizes and h1/h2 have bottom border
test_cases.description: Markdown headings render with correct visual hierarchy
steps: Send AI message with # h1, ## h2, ### h3, #### h4
Verify each heading has a different font size
Verify h1 and h2 have bottom border lines

test_cases.title: Blockquote has left border and muted text
test_cases.description: Blockquotes render with a left border and gray text color
steps: Send AI message with > quoted text

test_cases.title: GFM table has borders, padding, header bg, and zebra stripes
test_cases.description: Tables render with GitHub-style formatting
steps: Send AI message with a GFM table
Verify header row has background color
Verify even rows have striped background

test_cases.title: Strikethrough renders correctly
test_cases.description: ~~text~~ renders with line-through decoration

test_cases.title: Checked task list item renders with checked checkbox
test_cases.description: - [x] done renders as a checked, disabled checkbox

test_cases.title: Unchecked task list item renders with empty checkbox
test_cases.description: - [ ] todo renders as an unchecked, disabled checkbox

test_cases.title: Inline KaTeX formula renders correctly
test_cases.description: $E=mc^2$ renders as a styled math formula inline
steps: Send AI message with $E=mc^2$ in a paragraph
Verify formula renders with KaTeX styling

test_cases.title: Block KaTeX formula renders centered
test_cases.description: $$\sum_{i=1}^n i = \frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$ renders as centered block
steps: Send AI message with block-level $$ formula

test_cases.title: Invalid KaTeX formula shows raw text
test_cases.description: Malformed LaTeX does not crash, shows original text

test_cases.title: Simple flowchart renders as SVG
test_cases.description: Mermaid flowchart code block renders as a diagram

test_cases.title: Invalid Mermaid shows error fallback
test_cases.description: Malformed Mermaid syntax shows error message and raw code
steps: Send AI message with invalid ```mermaid block
Verify raw code is still visible

test_cases.title: Streaming phase shows plain text code blocks
test_cases.description: During streaming, code blocks render as plain text without highlighting
steps: Trigger AI streaming response with code blocks
Observe during streaming: no syntax highlighting, no copy button, no line numbers

test_cases.title: Streaming to complete transition is smooth
test_cases.description: No flicker or layout shift when switching from lightweight to full rendering
steps: Observe transition from streaming to complete

test_cases.title: Dark theme code highlighting switches correctly
test_cases.description: Switching to dark theme updates code block colors to One Dark Pro
steps: Display a message with code blocks in light theme
Verify code block colors change to dark theme palette

test_cases.title: Light theme code highlighting restores correctly
test_cases.description: Switching back to light theme restores GitHub Light colors
steps: Display a message with code blocks in dark theme
Verify code block colors restore to light theme palette

test_cases.title: Single message rendering under 100ms
test_cases.description: A ~5000 character message with 3 code blocks renders in under 100ms
steps: Send AI message with ~5000 chars and 3 code blocks
Use DevTools Performance tab to measure renderFull execution time

test_cases.title: Streaming phase has no frame drops
test_cases.description: Each streaming frame renders under 16ms
steps: Use DevTools Performance tab to measure frame times

test_cases.title: 100 messages scroll smoothly with lazy Mermaid loading
test_cases.description: Scrolling through 100 messages with Mermaid blocks is smooth
steps: Verify smooth scrolling with no jank
